parameters.command:
DATA_BACKUP=$(ls -1t /opt/backups/nextcloud/data/nextcloud-data-*.tar.gz 2>/dev/null | head -1); DB_BACKUP=$(ls -1t /opt/backups/nextcloud/db/nextcloud-db-*.sql.gz 2>/dev/null | head -1); HTML_BACKUP=$(ls -1t /opt/backups/nextcloud/html/nextcloud-html-*.tar.gz 2>/dev/null | head -1); printf "HOST=%s
" "$(hostname)"; printf "DATE=%s
" "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')"; printf "DATA_BACKUP=%s
" "$DATA_BACKUP"; printf "DB_BACKUP=%s
" "$DB_BACKUP"; printf "HTML_BACKUP=%s
" "$HTML_BACKUP"; printf "DATA_SIZE=%s
" "$(ls -lh "$DATA_BACKUP" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $5}')"; printf "DB_SIZE=%s
" "$(ls -lh "$DB_BACKUP" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $5}')"; printf "HTML_SIZE=%s
" "$(ls -lh "$HTML_BACKUP" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $5}')"; printf "SUCCESS_LOG=%s
" "$(tail -50 /var/log/nextcloud-backup.log 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'Nextcloud backup completed successfully')"; printf "DISK_USAGE=%s
" "$(df -h / | awk 'NR==2 {print $5}')"; printf "DISK_AVAILABLE=%s
" "$(df -h / | awk 'NR==2 {print $4}')"
